name: The Cult Behind the Killer: The Andrea Yates Story
original_name: The Cult Behind the Killer: The Andrea Yates Story
overview: Follows the Andrea Yates case, exploring how a rogue street preacher's fire-and-brimstone teachings allegedly brought the vulnerable Texas mother under his control, leading to the drowning of her five children in 2001.
